title: Level 1: The Missing Projector
briefing: A classroom projector went missing from Seminar Hall B after a training session. Four people had access to the room during the evening.
solutionExplanation: Vikram had the projector cart key, entered Seminar Hall B after the session, and CCTV showed him leaving with a covered trolley.

suspects.name: Ananya Rao
suspects.description: Helped arrange seating and left after attendance was completed.

suspects.name: Vikram Nair
suspects.description: Had access to equipment keys and was responsible for locking AV equipment.

suspects.name: Mehul Shah
suspects.description: Used the projector during the session and left immediately after his talk.

suspects.name: Priya Menon
suspects.description: Handled visitor registration near the main entrance.

evidence.title: Witness Statement - Ananya Rao
evidence.content: Ananya Rao says she left Seminar Hall B at 5:20 PM after collecting attendance sheets. She handed the room checklist to Vikram Nair before leaving.

evidence.title: Witness Statement - Vikram Nair
evidence.content: Vikram Nair says he only checked whether the lights were off at 5:35 PM. He claims he did not touch the projector cart.

evidence.title: AV Equipment Key Register
evidence.content: The projector cart key was signed out by Vikram Nair at 5:28 PM and returned at 6:10 PM. No other person signed out the projector cart key that evening.

evidence.title: CCTV Hallway Note
evidence.content: CCTV near Seminar Hall B shows Vikram Nair leaving the hallway at 5:48 PM while pushing a covered trolley. The trolley size matches the AV projector cart.

evidence.title: Room Access Log
evidence.content: Seminar Hall B door was opened at 5:31 PM using Vikram Nair's staff access card. No access was recorded for Mehul Shah or Priya Menon after 5:15 PM.

evidence.title: Reception Exit Log
evidence.content: Mehul Shah exited through the main gate at 5:18 PM. Priya Menon remained at the reception desk from 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM.

evidence.title: Incident Timeline
evidence.content: 5:15 PM: Session ended. 5:18 PM: Guest speaker exited. 5:20 PM: Ananya left hall. 5:28 PM: Vikram signed out projector cart key. 5:31 PM: Vikram accessed Seminar Hall B. 5:48 PM: Vikram left with covered trolley. 6:15 PM: Projector reported missing.
